message:
fix: replace screen-scraping with blind key-send in DetectStalledPolecats

Replaces AcceptStartupDialogs (screen-scraping via CapturePane + strings.Contains)
with DismissStartupDialogsBlind (sends Enter + Down+Enter without checking screen
content) in the stalled polecat remediation path. This eliminates coupling to
third-party Claude Code TUI strings that can change with any update.

Closes: gt-idrl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
